channel.title: first conference on NLPenguin
channel.description: Recent content in first conference on NLPenguin

item.title: Notes from EMNLP 2018
item.description: I’ve returned from EMNLP, my first big NLP conference, full of ideas, impressions and inspiration. I went there to present my paper on bipolar disorder prediction on Reddit at WASSA and, of course, to learn as much as I can! You can find my paper here. And yes, my talk went great, thanks for asking. Here I’d like to share my notes from all the talks I’ve attended. These were initially meant just for me, and I am probably the only one that will read them again :).
